♥ Since Silent Salt isn't out yet, here's some small HCs! ♥

  • Silent Salt is genderfluid non-binary (since we don't know their actual gender yet & I don't wanna spark any debates today).

  • Silent Salt likes to use they/them pronouns predominantly, however they do not mind using she/her/he/him pronouns either. This is mainly due to them being biologically intersex, so they have both female and male genitals, and they are more masculine-presenting in appearance.

  • Silent Salt doesn't quite like to give empty promises or grandiose speeches, opting instead for shortened sentences and gestures— heavily believing in 'action over words'.

  • Despite having lost the Souljam of Solidarity when they fell from the Witches' graces, they still hold onto some vestiges of solidarity within their silence. However, when they still had their Souljam, they were predominantly known as the Knight of Solidarity.

  • Silent Salt is a service top, always wanting to ensure their partner’s satisfaction first, and due to his past before beast hood as the Knight of Solidarity.

  • Since Silent Salt used to be the Knight of Solidarity, and thus took an oath of chastity they honored until now— Silent Salt is VERY sensitive.
